sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	小喬


	 Simplified Chinese 
	小乔


	 Pronunciation 
	Xiao Qiao 


	 Wade-Giles 
	Hsiao Ch‘iao

	 Birthplace 
	Lujiang

	 Name Notes 
	Xiao (小), in this context, translates to ‘Little’, thus ‘Younger’. Rather than refer to her as the ‘Younger Qiao’, the name Xiao Qiao has become a popular alternative. Da Qiao and Xiao Qiao were names first used by KOEI in Dynasty Warriors 3 when the characters were introduced. Note that Da4 and Xiao3 can still be used in this context in the modern-day family, and usually as the surname.

full_text:
Xiao Qiao 小喬
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiao Qiao (小喬)was born in Lujiang. Younger of Wu’s Qiao Sisters. Sister to Da Qiao. Married to Zhou Yu. Xiao Qiao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.

Younger of Wu’s Qiao Sisters. Sister to Da Qiao. Married to Zhou Yu.

Traditional Chinese小喬
Simplified Chinese小乔
PronunciationXiao Qiao
Wade-GilesHsiao Ch‘iao
BirthplaceLujiang
Name NotesXiao (小), in this context, translates to ‘Little’, thus ‘Younger’. Rather than refer to her as the ‘Younger Qiao’, the name Xiao Qiao has become a popular alternative. Da Qiao and Xiao Qiao were names first used by KOEI in Dynasty Warriors 3 when the characters were introduced. Note that Da4 and Xiao3 can still be used in this context in the modern-day family, and usually as the surname.
